name: callee
description: Run provider-aware subagent roles described in Markdown.

interface.longDescription: Run natural-language workflows through project-defined, provider-aware subagent roles.
defaultPrompt: $callee Review the current changes and fix any verified findings.
$callee With the reviewer role, review the current changes.
$callee-promptkit Create a Go code-review role from a PromptKit template for Codex.
